query: SELECT m.accountId, a.name AS accountName, m.role AS memberRole, m.userId, u.name AS userName FROM account_members m JOIN accounts a ON m.accountId = a.id JOIN users u ON m.userId = u.id WHERE m.userId IN (901752, 902504) AND m.role = 'owner';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nUtjHxifDnrEvTS.bc571705cde8 --database KNXKWFANWEUxWWEfuwT2Hr --execute SELECT m.accountId, a.name AS accountName, m.role AS memberRole, m.userId, u.name AS userName FROM account_members m JOIN accounts a ON m.accountId = a.id JOIN users u ON m.userId = u.id WHERE m.userId IN (901752, 902504) AND m.role = 'owner';
